reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger trade-off framing, clearer failure boundaries, and more useful selection guidance.
strengths: The comparison now explains not only what each sensor does well, but what each one cannot do well alone.
The added operational-question table increases selection value instead of leaving the piece at a surface-level feature comparison.
The article keeps a clean educational tone and avoids turning the comparison into vendor-style positioning.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it is clear, practical, and materially more decision-oriented than a generic sensor comparison. It now works as a real knowledge-base selection primer.
